description: Workflow for fetching data from external API and updating entity fields
name: entity_data_fetch_workflow

transitions.description: Normalize the API URL to lowercase
transitions.end_state_description: API URL has been normalized to lowercase
transitions.name: normalize_api_url

transitions.description: Fetch data from the normalized API URL and update entity
transitions.end_state_description: Data has been fetched and stored in entity
transitions.name: fetch_data
transitions.start_state_description: API URL has been normalized to lowercase
